items.name: Jumpsuit Kulit Punk Indische
items.description:
🖤 Jumpsuit Kulit Gothic Punk Indische 🖤

Sebuah jumpsuit kulit bergaya gothic punk dengan sentuhan khas Indische yang unik. Didesain dengan detail strap, tekstur kulit gelap, serta aksen logam yang tegas, outfit ini memancarkan energi pemberontak dan elegan sekaligus. Siluetnya ramping, kuat, dan penuh karakter—sempurna untuk pemain yang ingin tampil berani, edgy, dan tak tertandingi di setiap dunia Roblox.

items.name: The RL67 Herringbone Jacket
items.description: Created to mark the 50th anniversary of Ralph Lauren, the RL67 jacket draws inspiration from a herringbone sport coat that has been a treasured part of Mr. Lauren’s wardrobe since 1971. This reinterpretation is crafted in Italy with a black-and-white wool tweed that was custom-developed with Ireland’s Magee 1866 mill, which has been a Ralph Lauren partner for over 50 years.
